allow: Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command="CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sessions \(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT \(hex\(randomblob\(12\)\)\), session TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, created_at TEXT DEFAULT \(datetime\(''now''\)\)\)")

Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS curriculum \(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT \(hex\(randomblob\(12\)\)\), course_code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, course_title TEXT NOT NULL, credit REAL NOT NULL, year INTEGER NOT NULL, semester INTEGER NOT NULL, is_optional INTEGER DEFAULT 0\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM curriculum;")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "SELECT DISTINCT course_code FROM attendance WHERE course_code LIKE ''%25%'';")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "SELECT DISTINCT course_code FROM attendance;")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "UPDATE attendance SET course_code = REPLACE\(course_code, ''%20'', '' ''\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "UPDATE tutorials SET course_code = REPLACE\(course_code, ''%20'', '' ''\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "UPDATE tutorial_results SET course_code = REPLACE\(course_code, ''%20'', '' ''\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "UPDATE semester_results SET course_code = REPLACE\(course_code, ''%20'', '' ''\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute cse-department --remote --command "UPDATE class_schedules SET course_code = REPLACE\(course_code, ''%20'', '' ''\);")
